mapper.select:
SELECT user_id, nickname, status, role, created_at, profile_img,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_favorites WHERE user_id = #{requestId} AND target_user_id = #{userId} ) AS isFavorite
false AS isFavorite
,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_reports WHERE user_id = #{requestId} AND target_user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'pending' ) AS isReported
false AS isReported
FROM users WHERE status != 'deleted' AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT post_id, title, created_at
FROM posts WHERE status !='deleted' and is_notice != 1 and user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT gram_id, title, created_at FROM grams WHERE status !='deleted' and user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT c.choice_id, p.name AS productName, c.created_at FROM choices c INNER JOIN product_items p ON c.product_id = p.product_id WHERE c.is_selected = 1 AND c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_favorites (user_id, target_user_id, description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetUserId}, #{description})
INSERT INTO user_reports (user_id, target_user_id, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetUserId}, #{reason})
